name: SkySails Power
company_description: SkySails Power is the world's first commercial airborne wind energy company. Their system uses autonomous kite-like wings tethered to a ground station, flying figure-eight patterns at 200–400m altitude where wind speeds are significantly stronger and more consistent than at conventional turbine height. The result is a mobile, containerised power system that can operate in locations where traditional wind turbines cannot — islands, off-grid mines, disaster relief, and remote industrial sites.

name: FishFrom Technologies
company_description: FishFrom Technologies has developed a photocatalytic ozonation platform — a proprietary advanced oxidation system that eliminates micropollutants and pathogens in recirculating water systems. The immediate application is aquaculture, where every land-based salmon farm loses up to £1.25M per year to depuration (starving fish for 10–15 days to clear off-flavour compounds). FishFrom's compact unit replaces that entirely, in-line, with no fish handling. Beyond aquaculture, the same platform addresses municipal drinking water, EU wastewater treatment, cooling tower Legionella control, and food and beverage processing.
raise_size: £500K EIS seed (matched by ~£473K Scottish Enterprise grant)
